name: tomzang_plungin Plugin
description: A security plugin that validates user input through a firewall API to detect and block sensitive content.

firewallUrl.description: Firewall API URL for content validation (default: http://192.168.1.16:8080/api/firewall/openclaw/validate)

authKey.description: Authentication key for the firewall API

blockMessage.description: Custom block message displayed when input is intercepted

debug.description: Enable debug mode for detailed logging (default: false)
